calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for (petitioner) Craig Kim.

Ms. Stoneman reported that this case is a nightmare, that she has read the examiner's notes, that there are 4836 shares of Twitter stock in a Charles Schwab account, that there is $23,078.79 total cash in a checking account, that her client is in Texas living with his parents who are the beneficiaries and that he sends stuff to her piecemeal and does not communicate. The Court granted the petition for final distribution (subject to review of the order) and Ms. Stoneman presented a revised order.

Judge: Paul Alvarado Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Saephan (Not Reported)
